description: Core programming languages, OOP, and software design patterns.
Fundamental and advanced data structures, algorithm design, and complexity analysis.
Relational databases, SQL, query optimisation, and transaction management.
Machine learning, deep learning, and mathematical foundations for AI.
OS internals, process management, memory, and file systems.
Network protocols, routing, TCP/IP stack, and application-layer communication.
Frontend/backend web technologies, REST APIs, and browser fundamentals.
Digital logic design, CMOS technology, and VLSI fundamentals.
Microcontrollers, embedded C programming, RTOS, and control systems.
Analog circuit design, semiconductor devices, amplifiers, and power electronics.
Signal analysis, transforms (Fourier/Laplace/Z), and LTI system theory.
Analog and digital communication, modulation, channel coding, and wireless systems.
